author: nflaig
content:
lodestar does the same as teku, are you thinking about a similar note as in the https://ethereum.github.io/beacon-APIs/?urls.primaryName=dev#/Beacon/submitPoolAttestationsV2 description?

worth nothing there is already a 400 status code and the note here kinda suggests to apply gossip validation?
> A success response (20x) indicates that the bid passed gossip validation and was successfully broadcast onto the network.

> other clients
is there any other client besides prysm that is crazy enough to publish unvalidated messages? I thought it was just prysm that is doing this

author: mehdi.aouadi
content:
> lodestar does the same as teku, are you thinking about a similar note as in the https://ethereum.github.io/beacon-APIs/?urls.primaryName=dev#/Beacon/submitPoolAttestationsV2 description?
Based on this report: https://panda-uploads-production.devops-539.workers.dev/panda/uploads/90b447/teku-bid-rejection-report.html it looks like only Teku were rejecting bids that do not have matching proposer preferences. Internally we queue those for future processing and we retry them once we have new proposer preferences came in but that's an effort that is not required by the spec. Based on the spec https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/17016b664f92398c828f011900e8de050836cb55/specs/gloas/p2p-interface.md?plain=1#L420 those should be IGNORED. So the question would be: Should IGNORED bids be considered failed gossip validation and hence respond with a 400?

> is there any other client besides prysm that is crazy enough to publish unvalidated messages? I thought it was just prysm that is doing this
It looks like only Teku is rejecting those 😅

author: mehdi.aouadi
content: Important note: It could be a bug in Teku which is,for some reasons, not seeing the matching proposer preferences (not easy to figure out). But I would like to check how other clients behave first
